LAW AND MOTION 301, MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS -- ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE - PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION, PER EX PARTE ORDER FILED JAN. 5, 2010 IS GRANTED. THE SALE IS ENJOINED PENDING DETERMINATION OF THIS ACTION. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN A LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS AND AND IRREPERABLE INJURY. THIS PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS CONDITIONED ON PLAINTIFF POSTING A BOND IN THE AMOUNT OF $20,000 PAYING DEFENDANT THE PAST DUE AMOUNTS INCLUDING THE SEPTEMBER LATE PAYMENT AND CONTINUING TO TIMELY PAY THE MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS WAIVING ANY RIGHT TO CLAIM THAT DEFENDANT'S ACCEPTANCE OF THOSE PAYMENTS WAIVE HIS RIGHT TO ARGUE THAT PLAINTIFF IS IN DEFAULT. PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES, THE CASH PORTION IS TO PAID BY MONDAY, 1/24/2011 BY 3PM, BOND TO BE POSTED BY FEB. 1, 2011 AND THE TRO IS TO REMAIN IN EFFECT UNTIL FEB 1, 2011. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

Order To Show Cause - Preliminary Injunction, Per Ex Parte Order Filed Jan. 5, 2010. (301).
Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Lawrence Sussman, Esq. of Sheppard, Rosen, Uziel & Sussman, 415-296-0900 for plaintiff and moving party Agonafer Shiferaw
Daniel McLoughlin, Esq., 510-845-1816 for defendants and moving parties Jason Freskos and Sequoia Mortgage

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
Order To Show Cause - Preliminary Injunction, Per Ex Parte Order Filed Jan. 5, 2010 IS GRANTED. THE SALE IS ENJOINED PENDING DETERMINATION OF THIS ACTION. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN A LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS AND AND IRREPERABLE INJURY. THIS PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS CONDITIONED ON PLAINTIFF POSTING A BOND IN THE AMOUNT OF $20,000 PAYING DEFENDANT THE PAST DUE AMOUNTS INCLUDING THE SEPTEMBER LATE PAYMENT AND CONTINUING TO TIMELY PAY THE MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS WAIVING ANY RIGHT TO CLAIM THAT DEFENDANT'S ACCEPTANCE OF THOSE PAYMENTS WAIVE HIS RIGHT TO ARGUE THAT PLAINTIFF IS IN DEFAULT. PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES, THE CASH PORTION IS TO PAID BY MONDAY, 1/24/2011 BY 3PM, BOND TO BE POSTED BY FEB. 1, 2011 AND THE TRO IS TO REMAIN IN EFFECT UNTIL FEB 1, 2011. Moving party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
